v.description: A mighty CSS linter that helps you avoid errors and enforce conventions.

documentation.shortDescription: Determines if the project requires human code review before pull requests (aka merge requests) are merged.

checks.name: Packaging

documentation.shortDescription: Determines if the project is published as a package that others can easily download, install, easily update, and uninstall.

details: Warn: no GitHub/GitLab publishing workflow detected.

documentation.shortDescription: Determines if the project's GitHub Action workflows avoid dangerous patterns.

documentation.shortDescription: Determines if the project is "actively maintained".
